title: Aeronautics Propeller Blur
description: Client-side Create: Aeronautics Addon adding propeller blurring at high RPMs!
body:
This is an client-side addon for Create: Aeronautics that implements a blurring effect to propellers at high rotation speeds  

I have plans on applying it to the Propeller Bearings also but its kinda scuff so its gonna be a bit :P  
  
![Showcase](https://github.com/LopyLuna/LunaResources/blob/main/propblurimgPrev.gif?raw=true)
